user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add new certification sponsorship questions, so that employees requesting sponsorship provide the information we need
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Certification Questionnaire screen; When I click Add new sponsorship question and save it; Then the question appears in the Certification Sponsorship Questions list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add new certification reimbursement questions, so that reimbursement requests capture the required details
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Certification Questionnaire screen; When I click Add new reimbursement question and save it; Then the question appears in the Certification Reimbursement Questions list

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the questionnaire lists, so that I see the latest sponsorship and reimbursement questions
acceptance_criteria: Given questions have been added or changed; When I click Refresh on a questions list; Then the list reloads with the current records

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to proceed to the next configuration step using Next, so that I can complete the training setup workflow
acceptance_criteria: Given I have configured the certification questionnaire; When I click Next; Then I am taken to the following configuration step

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel my changes, so that I can exit without saving unintended edits
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Certification Questionnaire screen; When I click Cancel; Then my unsaved changes are discarded and I leave the screen
